command:
cat << 'EOF' > fix_skills.py
import re

with open("assets/data/skills.ron", "r") as f:
    content = f.read()

def inject(skill_id, signal):
    global content
    pattern = r'(id:\s*SkillId\("' + skill_id + r'"\).*?effects:\s*\[.*?\],)\n'
    replacement = r'\1\n        custom_signals: [' + signal + '],\n'
    content = re.sub(pattern, replacement, content, flags=re.DOTALL)

inject("petit_thunder", "Tentomon(BuildStaticCharge(amount: 1))")
inject("tentomon_follow_up", "Tentomon(BuildStaticCharge(amount: 1))")
inject("tentomon_ult", "Tentomon(BuildStaticCharge(amount: 1))")
inject("kabuterimon_basic", "Tentomon(BuildCircuitCharge(amount: 1))")
inject("mega_blaster", "Tentomon(SpendCircuitCharge(amount: 1))")
inject("mega_blaster_aoe", "Tentomon(SpendCircuitCharge(amount: 2))")
inject("kabuterimon_follow_up", "Tentomon(BuildCircuitCharge(amount: 1))")
inject("kabuterimon_ult", "Tentomon(SpendCircuitCharge(amount: 2))")

with open("assets/data/skills.ron", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
EOF
python3 fix_skills.py
